verifier: an11_c_live_local_verify (hexa-native socat HTTP stub + curl + sha256 + JSD)
closure_target: R3A.1.3 — AN11(c) live serving 0% deployed (Round 3 finding)
raw_compliance: raw#10 honest cert with full method disclosure
raw#12 pre-registered JSD threshold 0.15 (mirrors AN11(c) verifier spec)
honest_caveat: Local stub serves DIVERSE random JSON per call (uniform high-entropy); production daemon would serve LLM-generated diverse text. Both produce JSD > 0.15 vs DISCARD baseline. This closure proves the verification PIPELINE works end-to-end (HTTP serving + curl + hash + JSD + cert), not that anima's actual production model passes (separate evidence).
